text: DeepSeek-R1, an open source large language model, is presented as a competitive model to OpenAI’s ChatGPT. The innovation of DeepSeek-R1 is in its architecture design, which utilizes rule-based reinforcement learning (RL) without the need of initial supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and features a multi-stage training architecture with a cold-start data set prior to the RL stage, while maintaining the ability of deep reasoning and efficient training through a sophisticated reward function design. Experiments show that DeepSeek is more competitive in technical and logical reasoning, and is more transparent as the reasoning process is exposed. However, ChatGPT still has the leading position in general applications and creative generation. Despite the recent progresses in the field, the industry is still facing many challenges, such as poor data quality, mysterious interpretability, privacy preservation, and the severe social impact brought by job replacement. This paper forecasts the development of the next generation of AI, which will evolve towards multi-modal fusion and data processing, to construct a more reliable, effective and safe AI system for the users.
